I want to go over a couple of different things today. This is for you Okay, so here's the field when you're building a business as fast as I am right now And hopefully as fast as you are you're about to be right you can't slow down your growth Trying to get everything exactly right you can't build a huge customer service department and then hope that the customers show up I've actually made that mistake back. I think it was 1990 90 I Was a night night maybe like 96 a really long time ago I actually had an idea I started a satellite company back when I was a stratton And I went out was so short of work and I hired like 20 customers So I said hand over the incoming calls and guess what the walls never came in and I sat there with all these people burning over it So you can't pull the essentially the cart before the horse is the phrase goes right so yeah You have to go after building up that massive inflow of leads Closing tons of people building up a huge book of business and you can't have this ready-willing and able customer service department In sitting there in advance waiting for the calls in fact I know a book someone's coming a book called blitz It's called blitz marketing it's a little blitz whatever it was by a guy who found it on LinkedIn, right?
